symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral symmetric shoulder/hip girdle stiffness with all-day morning stiffness, distal sparing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bilateral girdle stiffness with prolonged morning stiffness and distal sparing in an older adult is the PMR phenotype.
Absolute sparing of the small joints is against RA.

symptoms.symptom_name: No GCA features (headache, scalp tenderness, jaw claudication, visual change)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of cranial ischaemic features lowers GCA probability, but it must be actively re-screened as it is vision-threatening.

symptoms.symptom_name: No focal neurological deficit / bladder-bowel change

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Symmetric proximal stiffness without focal deficit or sphincter change argues against a neurological emergency.

symptoms.symptom_name: High fall risk, dependent older adult

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Immobility with dependence on a carer risks falls, dehydration and pressure injury.
Poor simple-analgesic response with a dramatic anticipated steroid response fits PMR.

symptoms.symptom_name: Restricted painful girdle ROM, proximal tenderness, distal sparing, intact neuro, non-tender temporal arteries (examination)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The girdle findings with intact neurology and non-tender temporal arteries support PMR without GCA.

investigation_details.expected_result: Elevated, supporting an inflammatory process; markedly high with cranial features would raise GCA.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Cannot support the diagnosis or gauge inflammatory burden without inflammatory markers.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Elevated ESR/CRP supports PMR and the response to steroids is confirmatory.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Bilateral girdle stiffness with prolonged morning stiffness, distal sparing, a negative GCA screen and no focal neurology, in an older adult, is PMR — but GCA is a vision-threatening overlap that must be re-screened, and steroids should be started under in-person supervision with ESR/CRP, alongside fall-safety and carer support.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent in-person review with ESR/CRP (± FBC, LFTs) before/with steroid initiation
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To support the PMR diagnosis, exclude mimics, and start steroids appropriately.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Same-day ophthalmology/ED if any GCA feature emerges
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: GCA is a vision-threatening emergency requiring urgent high-dose steroids.
If GCA is suspected, to confirm — not a first remote step.
